metadata.methodology: Active listings = unique listings with at least 3 page views in the window. Multipliers shown when all 3 subscription tiers have at least 20 such listings.
notes: Page views and inquiries are summed across the trailing 3 complete months
Active listings counted only if they received ≥3 page views (filters dead inventory)
multiplier_reliable = false when any tier has <20 qualifying listings (small sample warning)
Tiny regions where any tier had <20 listings are excluded entirely
Viewer-origin split is region-specific when ≥5,000 region page views available; falls back to country-wide otherwise
Year-on-year growth (inquiries_yoy_pct) compares to the same 3-month window in 2025. Shown only when 2025 baseline had ≥50 inquiries.
Active listings YoY also shown; uses the same ≥50 baseline rule. Positive growth highlighted; flat or negative shown in muted gray.
Page views YoY compares to same 3-month window in prior year; shown when baseline ≥5,000 PV.
UK includes a "Greater London area" entry — city-level cut that overlaps with the England region. Useful for London-specific demo pitches.
metadata.display_note: Page views, inquiries, and active listings are shown as a per-month average computed from the trailing 3 complete months. YoY % is unchanged (3-month vs 3-month comparison).

regions.name: Andalusia (incl. Costa del Sol, Marbella, Malaga)
Peloponnese & Ionian Islands
regions.mixpanel_key: Peloponnese, Western Greece and the Ionian

regions.name: Greater London area
regions.note: City-level cut: includes London, Greater London, City of Westminster, City of London, central London neighborhoods and main boroughs. Overlaps with England region above.
